name: Grave/Digger; Pax Æterna
description:
"After the tearing, the crushing, the breaking of men’s bones, when the fruits of our prayers lie at our feet, God will descend from his throne on high to bring judgment upon his wretched and pitiful servants."

Warning: Themes of war and violence, potential non-con/death/rape/ and other unsavory topics.

The Queen has bestowed upon her a weapon of eternal peace. The woman wore the bandolier and picked up the arms from the shock kit.

She examined the shotgun with reverence. Five plus one shots, enough to ward off all evil.

"I'll cleanse them all, one shell at a time."

She declared as she loaded, raising the weapon towards a vacant spot in the base.

It was light.

She'd get used to it.

"Bang-"

She mimicked firing. It was important to practice for what's to happen tomorrow.

Her finger pulled away from the trigger as she lowered the gun.

People were staring at her again, how embarrassing.

She sat down and murmured to herself.

"Everything will be alright. Because,"

"I am a hero."

Grand Knight Hideo Tojima

Faction: Golden Empire

Role: Trench Trooper

Someone who fought in the surface during the King's and Queen's war. A mentally-ill and and socially awkward woman.

-yeah i saw that japan was part of the golden empire in the trello so i decided why not make the next character japanese

if it wasnt obvious enough, the poses are directly based on the manga "I am a hero", specifically, the first chapter

i had fun rendering them

anyways enjoy with this half-assed bot
